payload.task_title: Create a case study analysis: how would you apply random event weighting and pseudo-random distribution to solve a real business problem?

assets_produced.description: Core genetic code for random event weighting in recommendation systems
Comprehensive case study on e-commerce recommendation optimization

key_insights: Bounded random event weighting (0.5-1.2 range) prevents extreme algorithm weights
Pseudo-random distribution with session seeds ensures consistency while maintaining variety
Category diversity caps (max 3 per category) prevent filter bubbles
Real-time weight adaptation achieved 34% CTR improvement and 28% conversion rate increase

mutations_applied.description: Dynamic algorithm weight adjustment based on user feedback
Pseudo-random selection with golden ratio spacing
Exploration rate tuning for discovery vs relevance
